requirement_topic.en: PV Inverter EMC and EU-Type Interface Compatibility
requirement_topic.zh: 光伏逆变器EMC与欧盟型式兼容
requirement_topic.zht: 光伏逆變器EMC與歐盟型式相容

summary.en: Serbia applies CE-oriented EMC expectations for inverters that are sold or installed for EU-typical interface use. The Turkish template was replaced with Serbia-specific references and this path is now validated against EN 61000-series implementation expectations, including emission, immunity, and cable-interface behavior within grid-connection and installation constraints. Project-specific installation assumptions in Serbia should be confirmed before declaration.
summary.zh: 塞尔维亚对面向欧盟典型接口使用的逆变器应用CE对齐EMC要求。塞尔维亚路径需按EMC法规框架核查EN 61000系列实施要求，包括并网和安装约束下的辐射、抗扰度和线缆接口行为。应在声明前确认塞尔维亚项目中的安装假设。
summary.zht: 塞爾維亞對面向歐盟典型接口使用的逆變器應用CE對齊EMC要求。塞爾維亞路徑需按EMC法規框架核查EN 61000系列實施要求，包括併網及安裝限制下的輻射、抗擾度及電纜介面行為。應在聲明前確認塞爾維亞項目中的安裝假設。

standards_or_laws: EN 55011 for emissions and EN 61000-series immunity routes where adopted
Serbia-aligned product documentation for inverter installation settings

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 17799 generic EMC standards and GB 4824 interference criteria for industrial electrical equipment. These can support clause mapping but do not automatically satisfy Serbian CE-oriented EMC documentation for project grid and installation modes.
summary.zh: 中国通常使用GB/T 17799电磁兼容通用标准和GB 4824工业设备无线电骚扰限值。这些可用于条款映射，但不自动满足塞尔维亚针对项目并网和安装场景的CE对齐EMC文档要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常使用GB/T 17799電磁相容通用標準和GB 4824工業設備無線電騷擾限值。這些可用於條款映射，但不會自動滿足塞爾維亞針對項目並網和安裝場景的CE對齊EMC文件要求。

standards_or_laws: Product-specific China EMC standards for inverters

gap.en: Classify inverter systems for installation and grid roles, identify the applicable EN/IEC EMC clauses and test limits, provide cable shielding and wiring requirements, and keep installation assumptions synchronized with the Serbia-bound declaration.
gap.zh: 按安装和并网角色对逆变器系统进行分类，识别适用的EN/IEC EMC条款和测试限值，提供线缆屏蔽和布线要求，并将安装假设与面向塞尔维亚的申明保持一致。
gap.zht: 按安裝和併網角色對逆變器系統進行分類，識別適用的EN/IEC EMC條款和測試限值，提供電纜屏蔽和佈線要求，並將安裝假設與面向塞爾維亞的申明保持一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for inverters in-scope of Serbia CE-aligned EMC obligations; exact EN/IEC requirements depend on model configuration and installation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific for in-scope China EMC routes; GB/T evidence supports technical mapping

source.publisher: EUR-Lex; Institute for Standardization of Serbia (ISS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China EMC reports are useful, but Serbia-facing compliance depends on correct in-scope classification and EN/IEC evidence bound to the actual Serbia installation and interconnection conditions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国EMC报告有参考价值，但塞尔维亚合规取决于正确范围界定及与实际塞尔维亚安装和并网条件绑定的EN/IEC证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國EMC報告有參考價值，但塞爾維亞合規取決於正確範圍界定及與實際塞爾維亞安裝和併網條件綁定的EN/IEC證據。
